title: PC Jeweller is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: PC Jeweller is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, PC Jeweller in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About PC Jeweller:
PC Jeweller is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller!
